system.effect: This shoulder- or sternum-mounted augmetic grants +10 to Medicae and Interrogation Tests, assuming the user has the relevant skill. It carries six drug injectors, can staunch Blood Loss as a Half Action, and its chain scalpel can amputate on a +0 Medicae Test or inflict 1d5 Rending damage.
system.drawbacks: Requires the relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle. A character may not have more mechadendrites than his Toughness Bonus.

description.value: A surgical and injector mechadendrite intended for battlefield treatment and invasive procedures.

system.notes: Requires relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle.
